title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (3), SUBPARAGRAPH (ab), FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, PAGE 700, PARAGRAPH b, TITLE A, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4068 / 57 OG No. 12, 2108 (March 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2877, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (3), SUBPARAGRAPH (ab), FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE, PAGE 700, PARAGRAPH b, TITLE A, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (3), subparagraph (ab), for the Province of Leyte, page 700, paragraph b, Title A, Section three of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(3) Construction of 2-room building including

painting, Campokpok Barrio School, Tabango ........................ P12, 000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
